title: Noodle's Fracture
description: Fracture is a mod that adds new mobs, structures, cosmetic blocks, and more
body:
This mod is a mod made by the wonderful people of the noodle mod server, it features an assortment of tools, decorative blocks, mobs and many challenges to face in the expanding word of minecraft, this mod isn't finished and will be worked on a lot. The mod itself features a lot of cool stuff already, like cosmetic blocks, and a custom dungeon and bosses to challenge!


if you like this concept and want to help out with various tasks like beta testing, helping us make the mod, or just want to chat with some nice people, join our discord server!: https://discord.gg/k2efRnDxZ8
